case_title: NEAL DORIE BELLIDO VS BELLIDO SOLDIVINA N.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY NEAL DORIE BELLIDO AS TO DEFENDANT BELLIDO SOLDIVINA N. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEAL DORIE BELLIDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELLIDO SOLDIVINA N. $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
